title: Update docs to the pgvector reality; leave PWA capture cleanly disabled
userStory: As a maintainer, I want the docs to reflect the pgvector substrate and the PWA capture cleanly disabled so that the repo no longer describes a system that does not exist.
acceptanceCriteria: architecture.md component table and the descriptive docs (docs/, consumer-integration) describe Postgres + pgvector, sources/chunks, and recall/profile/map - graphiti/FalkorDB are no longer presented as the live substrate
README reflects the cutover (Phase 1 is the document substrate, not the graph)
The PWA capture screen is left in a clean disabled state (button disabled / 'capture returning later' note) since its /capture endpoint is gone - no console errors or broken POST
Verify: grep shows no doc claiming graphiti/FalkorDB is the current backend; loading the PWA shows capture cleanly disabled
